steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The sentence has a subject, Land, and needs a finite main verb to complete the clause. Since the action happened a decade after 1929, a past-tense verb fits the context.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is an infinitive phrase, not a main verb. Choice C is also an infinitive. Choice D is a participle and cannot stand alone as the sentence's main verb. The answer is A.
